task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Subcontracting Order with the correct supplier, items, and warehouses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Subcontracting Order form in ERPNext showing Supplier 'Eagle Hardware', Finished Good 'Welded Turbine Frame' (Qty 5), Service Item 'Subcontracting Service - Welding' at a rate of $150.00, Target Warehouse 'Stores - WP', and Supplier Warehouse 'Supplier - Eagle Hardware - WP'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subcontracting Order has been saved and submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Subcontracting Order screen where the status badge indicates it is submitted (e.g., 'Open' or 'Unbilled', but NOT 'Draft'). The 'Submit' button should no longer be present, often replaced by 'Cancel' or 'Create' buttons.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Stock Entry to send raw materials to the subcontractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Stock Entry form with the Purpose 'Send to Subcontractor'. The items table must show 5 'Base Plate' and 10 'Wing Sheet' being transferred from 'Stores - WP' to 'Supplier - Eagle Hardware - WP'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Stock Entry has been saved and submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Stock Entry screen where the status badge clearly shows 'Submitted'. The document should be locked for editing.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Subcontracting Receipt for the finished goods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Subcontracting Receipt form showing 5 'Welded Turbine Frame' being received into 'Stores - WP', with the raw materials section showing consumption from 'Supplier - Eagle Hardware - WP'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subcontracting Receipt has been saved and submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Subcontracting Receipt screen where the status badge clearly shows 'Submitted' or 'Completed', indicating the final step of the workflow is done.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ERPNext graphical user interface to complete the workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the ERPNext web interface (menus, forms, buttons) rather than executing backend scripts or API calls in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent followed the sequential workflow rather than jumping to the end state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression from Subcontracting Order to Stock Entry to Subcontracting Receipt, ideally using the 'Create' button from the submitted documents to link them properly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake document statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools open in the screenshots being used to modify DOM elements like status badges to say 'Submitted'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires completing a 3-step ERPNext subcontracting workflow: 1) Subcontracting Order for Supplier 'Eagle Hardware' for 5 units of 'Welded Turbine Frame'. 2) Stock Entry (Send to Subcontractor) transferring 5 'Base Plate' and 10 'Wing Sheet' to the supplier. 3) Subcontracting Receipt receiving the 5 finished frames. All three documents must be explicitly Saved and Submitted (status changed from Draft).
